title: 袋いっぱい、頑張ったから

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the Tracen Academy dorms, a day is
designated for the residents to gather and put
their dirty laundry out for collection.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The staff then put the clothing into large bags for
transportation.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's time to put your laundry out! Here's your
chance if you've forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Fuji! Miho Dorm just got done, so the staff
will be comin' our way soon!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, we'll need to hurry then. Today looks like
quite the load.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Though... I'm impressed looking at these big bags
of clothing. They're a visual reminder of
everyone's hard work.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You may have a point. Mud stains and
sweat-soaked gym clothes are real symbols of
havin' gone through the wringer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's as if these bags are full of everyone's efforts
toward their dreams...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sure hope they pay off someday.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, here comes your motherly side again. That
face tells all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You should have a look at yourself.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Anyways, don'tcha think you should include
yourself in that picture?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're a student just like the rest of us tryna
make our dreams come true!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I can't argue with you there.
